title: The Haunted Castle
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo unravels his uncle's fake haunted-castle scheme and helps two stingy families find love and friendship! 🏰

q.en: Who calls Geronimo collect to invite him to a ceremony at Penny Pincher Castle?
q.zh: 是谁打来由接听方付费的电话，邀请杰罗尼摩去小气城堡参加典礼？

options.en: Sally Ratmousen according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 莎莉·鼠莫森（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: A collect-call operator connects Geronimo to his uncle Samuel, who invites Geronimo, Thea, Trap, and Benjamin to Penny Pincher Castle for a ceremony.
explain.zh: 接线员转接了一通由接听方付费的电话，打电话的是塞缪尔叔叔，他邀请杰罗尼摩、蒂奥、特拉普和本杰明去小气城堡参加典礼。

q.en: Where is Penny Pincher Castle located?
q.zh: 小气城堡座落在什么地方？

options.en: San Mouscisco according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 鼠弗朗西斯科（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Cheap Change Hill in the Valley of Lack
options.zh: 匮乏山谷里的廉价零钱山

explain.en: The Stingysnout ancestral home, Penny Pincher Castle, sits on top of Cheap Change Hill in the Valley of Lack, reached by crossing Loneliness Passage.
explain.zh: 吝啬鼻家族的祖宅小气城堡，就建在匮乏山谷里的廉价零钱山顶，要穿过孤独峡谷才能到达。

q.en: On what date did Uncle Samuel say the ceremony would take place?
q.zh: 塞缪尔叔叔说典礼将在哪一天举行？

explain.en: Samuel invites Geronimo 'to Penny Pincher Castle for the ceremony that will take place on October thirty-first.'
explain.zh: 塞缪尔邀请杰罗尼摩去小气城堡，参加“将在十月三十一日举行的典礼”。

q.en: According to the fake will read by Larry Legalmouse, who inherited Penny Pincher Castle?
q.zh: 根据拉里·法律鼠律师宣读的假遗嘱，谁继承了小气城堡？

options.en: Uncle Samuel and Uncle Samuel alone
options.zh: 只有塞缪尔叔叔一个人

options.en: All the Stingysnout family according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 全体吝啬鼻家族（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The will reads: 'I, Bigwig Stingysnout, leave all that I own, by which I mean Penny Pincher Castle, to Uncle Samuel and Uncle Samuel alone!'
explain.zh: 遗嘱写道：“我，大佬·吝啬鼻，把我所有的一切，也就是小气城堡，只留给塞缪尔叔叔一个人！”

q.en: What strange thing did Geronimo discover about the coffin?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩发现棺材有什么奇怪的地方？

options.en: It was empty and very light
It was made of solid gold according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 它是纯金打造的（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: It was locked with a chain

explain.en: Geronimo tripped and bumped the coffin, finding it so light it seemed empty; Thea later lifted the lid and cried 'IT'S EMPTY!'
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩绊了一跤撞到棺材，发现它轻得好像是空的；后来蒂奥掀开盖子大喊“它是空的！”

q.en: Who was really the shadow sneaking around the castle at night?
q.zh: 夜里在城堡里四处溜达的影子，其实是谁？

explain.en: Trap grabbed the shadow by the tail, and a candle revealed hazel fur and bushy white eyebrows — it was Uncle Samuel himself.
explain.zh: 特拉普一把抓住了影子的尾巴，点上蜡烛后露出榛色皮毛和浓密的白眉毛——原来就是塞缪尔叔叔本人。

q.en: Why did Uncle Samuel make up the story of Uncle Bigwig?
q.zh: 塞缪尔叔叔为什么要编造大佬叔叔的故事？

options.en: He found a scroll saying the castle belonged to ALL descendants and wanted to keep it for himself
options.zh: 他发现一卷古卷写明城堡属于全体后裔，于是想独自霸占它

options.en: He wanted to throw a big birthday party according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 他想办一场盛大的生日派对（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: He wanted to sell the castle for money

explain.en: Samuel found an ancient scroll in the Great Hall showing the castle belonged to all Stingysnout and Stilton descendants, so he invented a sole heir to keep it alone.
explain.zh: 塞缪尔在大厅的抽屉里发现一卷古卷，上面写城堡属于吝啬鼻和斯蒂顿两族的全部后裔，于是他虚构了一个唯一继承人好独自占有城堡。

options.en: Uncle Samuel's younger sister who never laughs
options.zh: 塞缪尔叔叔的妹妹，她从不笑

options.en: Geronimo's aunt who loves to dance according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 杰罗尼摩爱跳舞的阿姨（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A famous chef at the castle
options.zh: 城堡里一位有名的厨师

explain.en: Chintzina is Uncle Samuel's younger sister; as a mouseling she never laughed because she didn't want to waste energy.
explain.zh: 钦齐娜是塞缪尔叔叔的妹妹；她小时候从不笑，因为不想浪费力气。

q.en: What does Chintzina make that becomes a New Mouse City fashion trend?
q.zh: 钦齐娜做的什么东西，成了新老鼠城的时尚潮流？

options.en: Artichoke bouquets according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 洋蓟花束（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Chintzina knits multicolored socks; a TV report says they are the hottest trend in New Mouse City and every boutique wants to buy them.
explain.zh: 钦齐娜会织五颜六色的袜子；电视新闻说这成了新老鼠城最火的潮流，每家精品店都想收购她的袜子。

q.en: Who asks Geronimo to dance and says she practices martial arts?
q.zh: 是谁邀请杰罗尼摩跳舞，并说自己练习武术？

options.zh: 泽尔达，斯蒂夫的表姐、记者

options.en: Aunt Sweetfur according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 甜毛阿姨（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Zelda, Stevie's journalist cousin who writes the 'Romantic Rodent' column and wears steel heels, drags Geronimo to dance and reveals she practices martial arts.
explain.zh: 泽尔达是斯蒂夫的表姐、记者，写“浪漫老鼠”专栏、穿钢跟鞋，她把杰罗尼摩拽去跳舞，并说自己练习武术。
